title: fumaria rupestris
intro: Fumaria rupestris, also known as rock fumitory, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Rock fumitory is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, skin problems, and gastrointestinal disorders.
